entries.title: Membrane study no. 3
entries.note: Tensioned latex vs. TPU test frame. TPU holds shape memory longer; latex reads touch better. Next: backlit push-rods.

entries.title: Shelf as structure rehearsal
entries.note: Threaded-rod MDF shelving with diagonal cable bracing — secretly a 1:1 study for tensioned installation frames.

entries.title: Substrate Command — de-install notes
entries.note: What survived three weeks of audiences: the printer. What did not: my Kinect mount. Documentation edit in progress.
